Emmanuele? Marc Dubois. It is great to finally meet you in person.
Marc! Three years of calls, and here you are. It is great to meet you too.
So, tell me. What are you working on at the moment?
I am currently working on the immunology portfolio. Right now, my team is preparing a launch.
A launch! Which one? We are watching Brazil very closely this year.
The asthma product. My field team is visiting the big centers this month. And you? What are you working on?
Me? I am looking at the pipeline for next year. Two new molecules in dermatology.
That is very interesting. I am looking forward to working with your team on that.
Hello. I do not think we have met. I am Emmanuele, from Sanofi Brazil.
It is great to finally meet you in person.
I am currently working on the immunology portfolio.
And you? What are you working on at the moment?
I am looking forward to working with your team.

Emmanuele, Marc Dubois. Good news. The dates for August are confirmed, and there is one thing before the presentation. On the first evening, we have a dinner. It is informal. No slides, no numbers. And I know this is the part you are afraid of. So here is my advice. Nobody at that table is currently thinking about your grammar. They are thinking about the food, and about the person next to them. Ask people what they are working on. That is the whole secret. And Emmanuele, I am looking forward to finally meeting you in person. Talk soon.

Good evening, everyone, and welcome to the immunology congress. My name is Claire Bennett, and I am opening this evening on behalf of the global team. Tonight is not a working session. Tonight is for the people. Around you there are doctors, executives, and colleagues from twenty-two countries. Some of them are launching a product this month. Some of them are preparing a new study. All of them are here because they want to talk to somebody new. So please, do not stay with your own team. Turn to the person next to you and introduce yourself. That is why we are all here. Enjoy the evening.

Hello. I do not think we have met. I am Emmanuele Orrico, from Sanofi Brazil. It is great to finally meet you in person. I am currently working on the immunology portfolio. And you? What are you working on at the moment? That is very interesting. I am looking forward to hearing more about it tomorrow.
